extraction.description: This screenshot shows a UiPath Maestro BPMN designer properties panel for an Exclusive Gateway path labeled "Approve." The path label is set to "Approve," the "Make default path" toggle is off, and a condition expression is configured in the Condition field. The expression shown checks whether the action variable equals "Approve."
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Label field, enter "Approve".
2. Leave the Make default path toggle turned off for this path.
3. In the Condition field, enter the expression `vars.action=="Approve"`.
4. Use this condition to route the process through the Approve path when the human task output is Approve.
